title: New Hampshire
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in New Hampshire

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in New Hampshire

You can apply for Medicaid in New Hampshire by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in New Hampshire

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in New Hampshire

Health Insurance Marketplace® in New Hampshire

CHIP in New Hampshire

New Hampshire CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for New Hampshire CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about New Hampshire CHIP.
